# S.D.Nil — Full Stack Web Developer

> Personal portfolio of S.D.Nil, a Full Stack Web Developer and UI/UX Designer based in Chattogram, Bangladesh. Specializes in building responsive, animated, and interactive web experiences.

## About

S.D.Nil is a passionate full-stack developer and designer focused on crafting visually appealing, user-friendly websites. With expertise spanning front-end and back-end technologies, S.D.Nil brings both design sensibility and engineering capability to every project.

## Skills

### Development
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SCSS, React, Next.js, Vue, Node.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Python, PHP, Java, C, C++, Bash

### Design
Figma, Adobe XD, Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop

## Projects

- Do You Love Me? — Interactive web experience: https://do-you-love-me-d.vercel.app/
- I Love You Animation — CSS/JS animation project: https://l-love-you-animation-nil.vercel.app/
- Tree Of Love — Visual web project: https://tree-of-love-nil.vercel.app/
- ToDo List App — Task management web app: https://to-do-list-app-nil.vercel.app/
